title: Garlicky Silky Turkish Squid Kofte
description: Indulgent Turkish dish featuring baby squid, beurre-monte, and a hearty garlic flavor. Served as a main course
instructions: Mix squid, garlic, breadcrumbs, parsley, and dill in a bowl until well combined.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate for 30 minutes.
Form squid mixture into small patties, about 1 1/2 inches in diameter.
Heat olive oil in a large non-stick skillet over medium-high heat.
Add patties to skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, until golden brown.
Transfer patties to a plate and cover with foil to keep warm.
To make beurre-monte, whisk together 1 tablespoon lemon juice and 1 tablespoon water in a small bowl until well combined.
Gradually whisk in 2 tablespoons softened butter, until smooth and emulsified.
Serve squid patties with beurre-monte spooned over the top.
